---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature, an R idiom we should support, or an enhancement.
title: "[feature] <one-line summary>"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What you want

<!-- A clear description of the feature or idiom you want to use. -->

## The R equivalent (if applicable)

```r
# How would you write this in CRAN R today?
# Paste an example. This makes it dramatically easier to scope
# the work and confirm we agree on the expected behavior.
```

## Why this matters

<!--
  What problem does this solve? What workflow does it enable?
  Concrete use cases are much more persuasive than abstract requests.
-->

## Alternatives you have considered

<!--
  Have you found a workaround? What does it look like?
  Why is it not sufficient?
-->

## Scope

- [ ] Tiny — a single new builtin or one function exposed
- [ ] Medium — a new module or extending an existing one significantly
- [ ] Large — new crate, new architectural surface, or a new dependency

## Are you willing to implement this?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to send a PR
- [ ] Partially — I can help with design but not implementation
- [ ] No, but I am happy to test once it lands

<!--
  All three answers are completely valid. Maintainers will not deprioritize
  requests because the requester doesn't have time to implement. We just
  appreciate knowing.
-->
